moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancellation Hits London
moments.blurb: The Wireless Festival, scheduled to take place at Finsbury Park in London from July 10-12, 2026, has been cancelled following the UK government's rejection of headliner Ye's (Kanye West) entry into the country.

angles.name: Main News
angles.copy: Wireless Festival was set to kick off today in London, but with headliner Ye barred from the UK, the whole event is off. What a last-minute blow for fans.

angles.name: Local Impact
angles.copy: Finsbury Park would have been buzzing today for Wireless Festival. Instead, silence. The cancellation fallout is a huge story across London this weekend.

angles.name: Controversy Angle
angles.copy: The Ye visa saga has led to Wireless Festival's cancellation. Was it the right decision, or a missed opportunity for music fans this weekend?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend Underway
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are heading into their dramatic final weekend, with the Men's and Ladies' Singles Finals scheduled for Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Finals Hype
angles.copy: It's Finals Weekend at Wimbledon! Who will lift the coveted trophy on Centre Court? Every serve, every volley, it all comes down to this.

angles.name: British Hope
angles.copy: Big day for British tennis! Arthur Fery is in the Men's Singles semi-final today at Wimbledon. Can he make it to the final?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz around Wimbledon is electric for finals weekend. Even if you don't have a ticket, London is soaking up the atmosphere!

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, held across various venues in England since June 12, 2026, concludes with the final match on Sunday, July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Final Match Day
angles.copy: It's almost here! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup culminates this Sunday with the grand final. Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Women's Sport Highlight
angles.copy: A fantastic tournament for women's cricket wraps up this weekend. Celebrating the incredible talent on display at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

moments.title: The Open Championship Golf Starts Next Week
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship will be played from July 16-19, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with practice days commencing from Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Golf Major Incoming
angles.copy: Get ready for golf's oldest major! The Open Championship tees off next week at Royal Birkdale, with practice rounds starting this Sunday.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts The Open for the 11th time next week. Expect drama, incredible shots, and maybe a few surprises on the Southport links!

moments.title: Henley Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, a boutique music and arts event, runs from July 8-12, 2026, featuring performances from Boy George & Culture Club, Ezra Collective, Sugababes, and Lulu.

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Henley Festival is in full swing! Catch iconic acts like Boy George & Culture Club, Sugababes, and Lulu performing in a stunning riverside setting.

angles.name: Unique Festival Vibe
angles.copy: More than just music, Henley Festival brings art, food, and incredible performances together. What a way to spend a summer evening!

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Rocking Gloucestershire
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a multi-award-winning independent rock and alternative music festival, is taking place from July 8-11, 2026, in Upcote Farm, Gloucestershire.

angles.name: Rock Festival Live
angles.copy: 2000trees Festival is happening right now! Who's moshing in Gloucestershire this weekend?

angles.name: Alternative Vibes
angles.copy: From heavy riffs to indie anthems, 2000trees is delivering the best in alternative music this weekend.

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Alexandra Palace Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival, a one-day music and arts event, returns to Alexandra Palace Park in London on Saturday, July 11, 2026.

angles.name: London Festival Tomorrow
angles.copy: Looking for plans tomorrow? Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park for a day of music, comedy, and more!

angles.name: One Day Wonder
angles.copy: Alexandra Palace is the place to be tomorrow for Kaleidoscope. Get ready for an epic one-day festival experience!

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival Hits Newcastle Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival, a major electronic music event, is set to electrify Newcastle on Saturday, July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Newcastle Rave Alert
angles.copy: Newcastle, are you ready? Lost Minds Festival descends tomorrow with a huge lineup of electronic music.

angles.name: Dance Music North East
angles.copy: The North East's biggest dance event, Lost Minds, is just hours away! Get your tickets and prepare to lose yourself in the music.

moments.title: New UK Official Singles Chart Revealed Today
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated every Friday, revealing the nation's most popular songs of the week.

angles.name: Chart Friday
angles.copy: It's Friday, which means a brand new UK Official Singles Chart is out! Who's at Number 1 this week? Tune in to find out!

angles.name: New Music Vibes
angles.copy: Fresh chart, fresh tunes! What new entries are making waves on the Official Singles Chart this week?

moments.title: Netflix Drops 'Shipwrecked: Nightmare At Sea' Today
moments.blurb: The new documentary 'Shipwrecked: Nightmare At Sea', detailing a 2012 luxury cruise shipwreck, is available on Netflix UK from today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: New True Crime Doc
angles.copy: Just landed on Netflix UK: 'Shipwrecked: Nightmare At Sea'. Get ready for a gripping true story of survival at sea.

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Your Friday night sorted? 'Shipwrecked: Nightmare At Sea' is the new must-watch documentary on Netflix.

moments.title: Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar Season 2 on Netflix Sunday
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar (Season 2)' will be available to stream on Netflix UK from Sunday, July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Reality TV Return
angles.copy: The pods are back! 'Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar (Season 2)' drops on Netflix this Sunday. Catch up with your favourite couples (and singles!).

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: What drama will unfold? Get ready to binge 'Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 this weekend on Netflix.

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever Arrives on Netflix Next Week
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated film 'Heartstopper Forever', bringing the hit romantic drama to an end, will be released on Netflix UK on Friday, July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Heartstopper Finale
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The emotional final chapter, 'Heartstopper Forever', arrives on Netflix next Friday. Get the tissues ready.

angles.name: Fan Anticipation
angles.copy: The countdown is on for 'Heartstopper Forever'! How do you think Nick and Charlie's story will end?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday to Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 tomorrow, July 11, 2026. She was born in 1959.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday for tomorrow to the incredible Suzanne Vega! Still listening to 'Luka' on repeat.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon! Suzanne Vega's unique sound continues to captivate. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy 50th Birthday to Luke Bryan
moments.blurb: Award-winning American country music superstar Luke Bryan celebrates his 50th birthday on Thursday, July 17, 2026. He was born in 1976.

angles.name: Country Star Turns 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday next week to country superstar Luke Bryan! What's your favourite of his anthems?

angles.name: Half Century of Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating Luke Bryan turning the big 5-0 next Thursday! Still rocking the stages and the charts.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday to Queen's Brian May
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 19, 2026. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday next Saturday to the iconic Brian May of Queen! His guitar solos are truly out of this world.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the genius of Brian May next week! What's your all-time favourite Queen track featuring his legendary guitar work?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday to Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Mexican-American guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 20, 2026. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday next Sunday to the legendary Carlos Santana! His sound is unmistakable.

angles.name: Eternal Groove
angles.copy: Still making incredible music, Carlos Santana turns 79 next week. Which of his classic tracks gets you moving?
